Course.title: Course
Course.description: An e-learning course offered by Twig Services.

description.description: A detailed description of the course.

thumbnail.description: URL to the course thumbnail image.

category.description: The category the course belongs to.

cpdUnits.description: Number of CPD units awarded upon completion.

totalTime.description: Estimated time to complete the course (e.g., '2 Hours').

price.description: The price of the course in GBP.

purchaseLink.description: Link to the 3rd party purchase page.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the course was created.

User.title: User
User.description: A registered user, potentially an admin.

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of user profiles and roles.
